creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Created attachment 189634
Update to botan 2.4.0

Also fixed building for aarch64. 'botan speed' works in my poudriere aarch64 jail. Might need further testing on a real ARM64 platform though.

Buildlogs:
aarch64: https://pkg.cainites.net/data/freebsd_11a64-system/latest-per-pkg/botan2-2.4.0.log
amd64: https://pkg.cainites.net/data/freebsd_11x64-system/latest-per-pkg/botan2-2.4.0.log

Changelog: https://botan.randombit.net/news.html#version-2-4-0-2018-01-08
